data.body: I agree with you 100% - feeds are not the solution. Which is why I don’t get the hype around @surf.social - it’s all about managing never-ending feeds, whose entire goal is to get you to keep scrolling. It’s almost as if we need a benevolent algo that picks one worthy thing for you to read per day.
